case_title: JUAN ORTIZ VS. STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:DANA SILVER) -SEE SIGNATURE- SERVED AUG-14-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE AMENDED COMPLAINT TO NOV-17-2014 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
